name: Arepas Rellenas Con Guiso De Carne (Stuffed Arepas)
recipeIngredient: 2 large Tomato, peel and seed, chop
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a heavy skillet over medium heat.
2. Add meat, onions, garlic, green chile, tomatoes, achiote, cumin, thyme, black pepper, and salt to the skillet.
3. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 20 minutes or until tomatoes have formed a thick sauce.
4. Stir in olives and capers.
5. Prepare basic arepas by shaping them into 3-inch discs (3/4 inch thick).
6. Cook the arepas.
7. When done, split each arepa in half.
8. Fill with meat sauce and serve hot.
